title: Numbness as Strength
html: Stub. Yahir's named pattern: in the middle of dad-crises (psychosis, suicidality, alcoholism episodes), a "physical and mental block in my brain stem" prevents emotion from seeping through, leaving him rational, able to read the situation, and able to land messages with high impact. He treats it as a reach earned by repetition. First explicitly named in 2022 10 15 things on 10 1415 2022.

related.label: First white hairs — Feb 8 2020 stress reflection
